route-install-bgp.display_name: BGP learned route installation to ASIC
route-install-bgp.trigger: BGP session receives UPDATE with new prefix

route-install-static.trigger: User configures a static route via config CLI

port-config.trigger: User changes port speed, MTU, or admin state

vlan-create.trigger: User creates a VLAN and adds member ports

lag-create.trigger: User creates a PortChannel and adds member ports
